prompt: I'm using Mantine in my project and I want a card component that shows a user profile with their avatar on the left, name and role on the right, and a follow button. The card should have rounded corners, a subtle shadow, and look nice in both light and dark mode.

assertions.name: uses-mantine-card
assertions.evidence: Uses Card with shadow='sm', radius='lg', withBorder, padding='md'

assertions.name: no-manual-dark-mode
assertions.text: Does not manually check color scheme
assertions.evidence: No useMantineColorScheme or useMantineTheme usage - relies on Card withBorder and semantic color tokens

assertions.name: uses-classnames-not-styles
assertions.text: Uses classNames prop with CSS modules
assertions.evidence: classNames={{ root: classes.card }} and classNames={{ root: classes.avatar }}

assertions.name: mantine-semantic-colors
assertions.evidence: Uses c='dimmed' for role text, Mantine handles theming internally

assertions.name: radius-shadow-props
assertions.text: Uses radius and shadow props on Card

assertions.name: no-deprecated-props
assertions.text: Does not use deprecated v6 props
assertions.evidence: Uses noWrap (which is fine in v7), Group uses wrap='nowrap' properly, fw prop used correctly

assertions.name: no-manual-dark-mode
assertions.text: Does not manually check color scheme
assertions.evidence: Imports and uses useMantineColorScheme() and useMantineTheme() to check isDark and manually set colors

assertions.name: uses-classnames-not-styles
assertions.evidence: Uses style prop extensively with inline styles for backgroundColor, borderColor, borderWidth, etc.

assertions.name: mantine-semantic-colors
assertions.evidence: Uses theme.colors.dark[7], theme.white, theme.colors.dark[3], theme.colors.gray[6] - manual color lookups instead of semantic tokens

assertions.name: radius-shadow-props
assertions.evidence: Card radius='lg' shadow={isDark ? 'xl' : 'sm'} - though shadow differs by mode unnecessarily

assertions.name: no-deprecated-props
assertions.text: Does not use deprecated v6 props
assertions.evidence: Uses noWrap (should be wrap='nowrap' in v7), direction='column' (should be vertical in Group or use Stack), spacing={4} (should be gap='4'), weight={600} (should be fw={600}), color on Text (should use c prop)
